name: NANTEX Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: NANTEX Industry Co., Ltd. produces and sells synthetic rubber latex, acrylonitrile-butadiene rubber, carbon masterbatch compounds, and thermoplastic elastomer products worldwide. Its NANTEX synthetic rubber latex products are used in making examination, medical, household, and industrial gloves, as well as in art papers, coated white board, carpet backings, shoe insoles, adhesives, plastic modification agents, construction materials, saturation in non-woven fabrics, and artificial leathers. The company's acrylonitrile-butadiene rubber products are used in industrial and automotive goods, belts, fuel hoses, O-rings, gaskets, shoe soles, insulation equipment, sporting goods, and printing rollers products, as well as electronic parts. Its DYNAPRENE thermal plastic elastomer products are used in automotive parts, construction materials, food industries, sporting goods, industrial products, 3C industries, medical equipment, and plastic modification agents; and carbon masterbatch compounds for use in O-rings, gaskets, fuel hoses, foam products, cables, rollers, shoe soles, and automotive parts. The company was formerly known as President Fine Chemical Industry Co. Ltd. and changed its name to NANTEX Industry Co., Ltd. in October 1991. NANTEX Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
